remarks: Land opportunity priced under 1 million on quiet cul-de-sac overlooking Milne Lake. This vacant property offers a serene setting with stunning reservoir views, combining natural beauty with exceptional convenience. Located in a premier New Canaan neighborhood, at the very end of the street, this tree-lined spot is perfect for walking, biking, and enjoying nearby nature reserves. While it feels worlds away from the bustle, it is only minutes from local amenities and offers easy Metro-North access to NYC. Whether you are looking to create a weekend retreat or a forever home, this property is the perfect canvas for your custom build.
